features.description: The double-entry money-movement ledger. Every invoice payment / refund / chargeback / coupon credit / tax remittance / fee charge produces one or more transactions with balanced ledger entries.
Record transactions in currencies other than the tenant's base currency. Exchange rate is captured atomically at commit + used for base-currency-normalized reporting. Medium+ tier.
Monthly GL report + custom GL exports as accountant-shaped CSV + JSONL. Per-account opening balance + all posted transactions + closing balance + total debits + total credits. Medium+ tier.
On-demand invocation of ReconcileLedgerBalancesJob + read-access to the reconciliation-run audit trail via API. For Enterprise finance teams integrating with external audit tooling.
Extends transaction + ledger-entry retention from 7 years to 10 years. For finance regimes that require > 7-year audit trails. Enterprise-only.
SDUI surface for admin-authored ledger corrections. Requires the admin role + a written amendment note. Every reversal writes a critical audit row (retention 7 years).
SDUI surface showing the last N reconciler runs + any detected imbalances. Read-only.
AccountBalanceThresholdCrossed alerts route to configured recipients when a per-account balance crosses a watermark (e.g. accounts_receivable > $50k).
